parameters.name: ReferenceCustomer
parameters.description: When provided, retrieves offers accessible to that customer. The Links object will contain a link to directly subscribe to this offer

parameters.name: ReferenceCustomerBuyer
parameters.description: When provided, retrieves offers accessible to that customer as a buyer. The Links object will contain a link to directly subscribe to this offer. If ReferenceCustomer is also specified, the subscription will have the customer as recipient

parameters.name: Upgrade
parameters.description: When `true`, and a `ReferenceCustomer` or `IdSubscription` has been specified, and the current offer for that subscription or customer is a different one, the link returned for this offer redirects the customer to the upgrade workflow

parameters.name: IdSubscription
parameters.description: Internal identifier of the subscription to upgrade. When provided, the offer link redirects the customer to the upgrade workflow for that subscription — alternative to `ReferenceCustomer` + `Upgrade`

parameters.name: IsVisible
parameters.description: Default `null` — offers and features of any visibility are returned. When `true`, only visible offers and features are returned; when `false`, only hidden ones. If the offer's visibility does not match the filter, the offer is not returned at all

parameters.name: Html
parameters.description: When true (default), localized pricing fields are returned as HTML

parameters.name: IgnoreFeatures
parameters.description: When true, the Features array is omitted from the response

parameters.name: Links
parameters.description: When false, the Links array is omitted (default true)
